testcase.name: test_wallet_returns_credits
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_engagement_dashboard_iteration161.py:238: in test_wallet_returns_credits assert response.status_code == 200, f"Wallet API failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Wallet API failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
